Problems We treat
in Tanger

call or text 0666-061666

Helping youSmile with Confidence

At Dr. Reda Saoui's clinic, your expert dentist in Tangier, we specialize in transforming smiles and lives. Whether you are dealing with complex orthodontic issues, missing teeth requiring implants, or aesthetic concerns like stained or chipped teeth, we provide world-class solutions.

Our approach integrates Orthodontics (Invisalign), Implantology, and Cosmetic Dentistry (Veneers) under one roof. We use digital smile design to plan your treatment, ensuring predictable, stunning results that harmonize with your face and personality.

Schedule your consultation at 0666-061666 and start your journey to a perfect smile.

Suffer from dental anxiety?
Discover our Solea Laser solution

In our dental practice in Tangier, we address dental anxiety with the innovative Solea Laser, a pain-free solution that eliminates the need for drills, needles, scalpels, or loud noises during treatments. With this technology, you can experience dental care without stress or discomfort!

Problems

We treat

Bad breath / Halitosis

Bleeding gums

Chipped/Cracked tooth repair

Crooked teeth

Infant frenectomies

Sleep apnea & snoring
